Record Class NetworkInterfaceInfo

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware.NetworkInterfaceInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
OSHardwareObject
public record NetworkInterfaceInfo(String name, String displayName, String macAddress, long speed, long mtu, List<String> ipv4Addresses, List<String> ipv6Addresses, long bytesReceived, long bytesSent, long packetsReceived, long packetsSent, long inErrors, long outErrors) extends Record implements OSHardwareObject
Value object representing a network interface.

    True if this interface appears active (speed > 0 and has an IP address).

    True if this interface is running at gigabit (1 Gbps) or faster.

    True if this interface is a loopback interface.

  • Constructor Details

    • NetworkInterfaceInfo

      public NetworkInterfaceInfo(String name, String displayName, String macAddress, long speed, long mtu, List<String> ipv4Addresses, List<String> ipv6Addresses, long bytesReceived, long bytesSent, long packetsReceived, long packetsSent, long inErrors, long outErrors)
      Creates an instance of a NetworkInterfaceInfo record class.
      Parameters:
      name - the value for the name record component
      displayName - the value for the displayName record component
      macAddress - the value for the macAddress record component
      speed - the value for the speed record component
      mtu - the value for the mtu record component
      ipv4Addresses - the value for the ipv4Addresses record component
      ipv6Addresses - the value for the ipv6Addresses record component
      bytesReceived - the value for the bytesReceived record component
      bytesSent - the value for the bytesSent record component
      packetsReceived - the value for the packetsReceived record component
      packetsSent - the value for the packetsSent record component
      inErrors - the value for the inErrors record component
      outErrors - the value for the outErrors record component

  • Method Details

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
      True if this interface appears active (speed > 0 and has an IP address).

    • isLoopback

      public boolean isLoopback()
      True if this interface is a loopback interface.

    • isGigabit

      public boolean isGigabit()
      True if this interface is running at gigabit (1 Gbps) or faster.

    • hasErrors

      public boolean hasErrors()
      True if this interface has any inbound or outbound errors.

    • speedFormatted

      public String speedFormatted()

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
